tasks.label: Smoke Test (10 imgs) — week1_baseline
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_infer.py --config week1_baseline --limit 10

tasks.label: Smoke Test (10 imgs) — best_accuracy
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_infer.py --config best_accuracy --limit 10

tasks.label: Full Inference — week1_baseline
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_infer.py --config week1_baseline

tasks.label: Full Inference — best_accuracy
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_infer.py --config best_accuracy

tasks.label: Eval — week1_baseline
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_eval.py --pred-dir outputs/predictions/week1_baseline

tasks.label: Eval — best_accuracy
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/run_eval.py --pred-dir outputs/predictions/best_accuracy

tasks.label: Prepare NYUv2 Data
tasks.command: env -u PYTHONPATH -u AMENT_PREFIX_PATH PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ~/miniconda3/envs/mobile-sam/bin/python scripts/prepare_nyuv2.py --root data/nyuv2
